    Index

    A C D E F G I L M N P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    activeHomePage - Static variable in class applicationMain.FoundationsMain
    Tracks which role's home page is currently active (0 = admin, 1 = role1, 2 = role2).
    addPost(Post) - Method in class entityClasses.PostList
    Method: void addPost(Post post)
    addReply(Reply) - Method in class entityClasses.ReplyList
    Method: void addReply(Reply reply)
    adminRole - Variable in class database.Database.UserDetails
    Whether this user has the admin role.
    applicationMain - package applicationMain
    The applicationMain package is used to hold the mainline classes for the application.
    A C D E F G I L M N P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values
